perFrameCode: DirX= reg26; DirY= reg27; DirZ = reg28;
PosX = PosX + ds*DirX ; PosY = PosY + ds*DirY; PosZ = PosZ + ds*DirZ;
q4 = PosX; q5 = PosY; q6 = PosZ;
c1 = cos(v1); c2 = cos(v2+ty); c3 = cos(v3+tx);
s1 = sin(v1); s2 = sin(v2+ty); s3 = sin(v3+tx);
//Coord. Trans. must exactly match def in warp S. !!!!
uvx = reg26*dist/q7; uvy = reg27*dist/q7; uvz = reg28*dist/q7;
uvx += PosX; uvy += PosY; uvz += PosZ;
uvx0 = uvx+q8; uvy0 = uvy+q8; uvz0 = uvz+q8;
uvx = if (slen < 0.25, uvx*4, if (slen < 1, uvx/slen, uvx)) *2.6 + uvx0;
uvy = if (slen < 0.25, uvy*4, if (slen < 1, uvy/slen, uvy)) *2.6 + uvy0;
uvz = if (slen < 0.25, uvz*4, if (slen < 1, uvz/slen, uvz)) *2.6 + uvz0;
n = 0; avg = 0; loop (5, n=n+1; avg = avg+abs(megabuf(n)/5));
q10 = ds*q7; //compensation of lin. movement in GetDist and zoom uv
warp = 0.0; zoom = 1; dx = q12/q16; dy = q13/q16;
perFrameInitCode: ran1 = rand(8); ran2 = rand(8); ran3 = rand(8);
PosX = rand(8); PosY = rand(8); PosZ = rand(8);
c1 = cos(ran1); c2 = cos(ran2); c3 = cos(ran3);
s1 = sin(ran1); s2 = sin(ran2); s3 = sin(ran3);
//Coord. Trans. must exactly match def in warp S. !!!!
uvx = reg26*dist/q7; uvy = reg27*dist/q7; uvz = reg28*dist/q7;
uvx += PosX; uvy += PosY; uvz += PosZ;
uvx0 = uvx+q8; uvy0 = uvy+q8; uvz0 = uvz+q8;
uvx = if (slen < 0.25, uvx*4, if (slen < 1, uvx/slen, uvx)) *2.6 + uvx0;
uvy = if (slen < 0.25, uvy*4, if (slen < 1, uvy/slen, uvy)) *2.6 + uvy0;
uvz = if (slen < 0.25, uvz*4, if (slen < 1, uvz/slen, uvz)) *2.6 + uvz0;
perPixelCode: //muss experimentell an tele angepasst werden; momentan 1.5 !!!
